description:
Poem learns the nagging class monitor is an idiot who lives nearby. Her friends learn they`re growing close.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: The Class Monitor is a Klutz / The School Girl`s Friends Get Involved with the Klutz / The Klutzy Class Monitor and the Health Representative
風紀委員がポンコツだった話 / JKの友人たちとポンコツがからむ話 / ポンコツ風紀委員と保健委員の話
